General.Name: Beijing Energy International Holding Co Ltd
General.GicIndustry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
General.Description: Beijing Energy International Holding Co., Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in the investment, development, operation, and management of power plants and other clean energy projects in the People's Republic of China, Australia, and Vietnam. It operates through Solar Power Business, Wind Power Business, and Hydro Power Business segments. The company is involved in the design and installation of solar power systems; and research and development of solar power products and solar technology, as well as operates and manages wind, hydro, and solar power plants. It also holds development rights for hydropower and solar power projects. As of 31 December, 2024, the company owned 166 solar power plants, 38 wind power plants, 26 hydro power plants, and 3 energy storage power stations with an aggregate grid-connected installed capacity of approximately 12,639 megawatts. The company was formerly known as Panda Green Energy Group Limited and changed its name to Beijing Energy International Holding Co., Ltd. in September 2020. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
